positive: A vibrant, retro 80s vaporwave illustration of a futuristic cityscape viewed from a neon-lit beach. Palm trees, glowing grid lines, a stylized pink sunset, and a chrome sports car. Synthwave aesthetic, high saturation, detailed illustration, geometric shapes.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sepia, natural lighting, boring, messy lines
